evidence_items.fact_text: Incident is named Lavalending 2024-10-02 price-manipulation incident.

evidence_items.reasoning: Stated in the incident context summary.

evidence_items.fact_text: The incident occurred on the Arbitrum blockchain.
evidence_items.reasoning: Stated in the incident context and all on-chain source URLs are on Arbiscan (arbiscan.io).

evidence_items.fact_text: An estimated loss of about $130K was caused by the attack.
evidence_items.reasoning: Stated in the incident context as an estimate; the quality assessor noted this lacks on-chain substantiation.

evidence_items.fact_text: The attack was a price-manipulation attack against LavaLending.
evidence_items.reasoning: Stated in the incident context summary. However, the specific manipulation technique (flash loan, oracle spoofing, liquidity pool manipulation) is not detailed in the source documents.

evidence_items.fact_text: The attack transaction hash on Arbitrum One is 0xb5cfa4ae4d6e459ba285fec7f31caf8885e2285a0b4ff62f66b43e280c947216.
evidence_items.reasoning: The full transaction hash is directly present in the Arbiscan transaction page URL.

evidence_items.fact_text: USDC (USD Coin) ERC-20 token contract on Arbitrum One at address 0xaf88d065e77c8cc2239327c5edb3a432268e5831.
evidence_items.reasoning: Address is present in the Arbiscan token page URL; however, direct involvement in the attack is not confirmed in the source documents.

evidence_items.fact_text: A Notion page on web3sec.notion.site contains a report about the incident.
evidence_items.reasoning: URL was provided as a source document; however, the page content was not successfully captured (only browser compatibility check JavaScript was retrieved).
